  • Uses of ExpectsValidResource in org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.extension.r4

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.extension.r4 with annotations of type ExpectsValidResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ChCorePractitionerRole
    ChExtEprDataEnterer.resolveEnterer()
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Resolves the person and organization that entered data or throws.

  • Uses of ExpectsValidResource in org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.r4

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.core.ch.resource.r4 with annotations of type ExpectsValidResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Address
    ChCorePatient.resolveAddress()
    Resolves the address.
    LocalDate
    ChCorePatient.resolveBirthDate()
    Resolves the patient's birthdate or throws.
    ChCoreComposition
    ChCoreDocument.resolveComposition()
    Returns the composition or throws.
    ChCoreCompositionEpr
    ChCoreDocumentEpr.resolveComposition()
    Returns the composition or throws.
    default List<@NonNull org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint>
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolveEmailAddresses()
    Resolves the entity's email addresses.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Enumerations.AdministrativeGender
    ChCorePatient.resolveGender()
    Resolves patient's gender if possible.
    @Nullable String
    ChCorePractitioner.resolveGln()
    Resolves the practitioner's GLN identifier.
    default List<@NonNull org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint>
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolveInternetAddresses()
    Resolves the entity's internet addresses, i.e.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.HumanName
    ChCorePatient.resolveName()
    Resolves the human name.
    default List<@NonNull org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint>
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolvePhoneNumbers()
    Resolves the entity's phone numbers.
    default @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolvePreferredEmailAddress()
    Resolves the list of email addresses of the entity and, if it is not empty, it gets the preferred email address from teh list, i.e. the email address contact point with the lowest rank.
    default @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolvePreferredInternetAddress()
    Resolves the list of internet addresses of the entity and, if it is not empty, it gets the preferred internet address from teh list, i.e. the internet address contact point with the lowest rank.
    default @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolvePreferredPhoneNumber()
    Resolves the list of phone numbers of the entity and, if it is not empty, it gets the preferred phone number from teh list, i.e. the phone number contact point with the lowest rank.
    default List<@NonNull org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint>
    ChCoreContactPointCarrier.resolveTelecom(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ContactPoint.ContactPointSystem system)
    Resolves the entity's list of telecom entries for the given system.

    Description

    ChEmedOrganization.resolveAddress()

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.datatypes with annotations of type ExpectsValidResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable Duration
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveBoundsDuration()
    Resolves the treatment duration, if specified.
    @Nullable ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits
    ChEmedRatioWithEmedUnits.resolveDenominator()
     
    @Nullable Dose
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveDose()
    Resolve the dose.
    ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits
    ChEmedRangeWithEmedUnits.resolveHigh()
    Resolves the high quantity.
    ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits
    ChEmedRangeWithEmedUnits.resolveLow()
    Resolves the low quantity.
    @Nullable AmountQuantity
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveMaxDosePerAdministration()
    Returns the resolved max dose per administration, or null if it is not specified.
    @Nullable AmountQuantity
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveMaxDosePerLifetime()
    Returns the resolved max dose per lifetime, or null if it is not specified.
    @Nullable AmountPerDuration
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveMaxDosePerPeriod()
    Returns the resolved max dose per period, or null if it is not specified.
    @Nullable ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits
    ChEmedRatioWithEmedUnits.resolveNumerator()
    Resolves the numerator quantity or null.
    BigDecimal
    ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits.resolveQuantity()
    Resolves the quantity.
    @Nullable RouteOfAdministrationEdqm
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveRouteOfAdministration()
    Resolve the routeOfAdministration of administration.
    UnitCode
    ChEmedQuantityWithEmedUnits.resolveUnitCode()
    Resolves the coded form of the unit.
    List<TimingEventAmbu>
    ChEmedEprDosage.resolveWhen()
    Resolves the list of with event timings.

  • Uses of ExpectsValidResource in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan with annotations of type ExpectsValidResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData.addRisk(EMediplanRisk risk)
    Convenience method to add a risk to a medical data object.
    abstract boolean
    EMediplanMedicament.isSelfMedication()
     
    abstract EMediplanType
    EMediplan.resolveType()
    Resolves the eMediplan type, which can be missing for ChMed23A eMediplan objects authored by a patient, because a Medication Plan is assumed (since they are not allowed to author prescriptions).
    String
    EMediplan.toChTransmissionFormat()
    Converts the eMediplan format to the ChTransmissionFormat specified by the relevant ChMed specification.
    ChEmedEprOrganization
    EMediplanHealthcareOrganization.toFhir()
    Gets the CH EMED EPR equivalent of this eMediplan organization object, if possible.
    ChEmedEprPractitioner
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson.toFhir()
    Gets the FHIR representation of this eMediplan healthcare person as a ChEmedEprPractitioner object.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Identifier
    EMediplanIdentifier.toFhir()
     
    ChEmedEprPatient
    EMediplanPatient.toFhir()
    Gets the CH EMED EPR FHIR representation of the eMediplan patient object.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Address
    EMediplanPostalAddress.toFhir()
     

  • Uses of ExpectsValidResource in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a with annotations of type ExpectsValidResource
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nullable ChMed16AExtension
    ChMed16AExtension.findExtension(@Nullable List<@NonNull ChMed16AExtension> extensions, String name)
    Finds an extension within the provided list of extensions whose schema and name match the provided ones.
    static EPrescription
    EPrescription.fromChTransmissionFormat(String chTransmission)
    Parses an ePrescription from a ChTransmissionFormat String, as specified by eMediplan.
    boolean
    ChMed16AMedicament.isSelfMedication()
    This method expects the Medicament object to be valid.
    ChEmedEprOrganization
    ChMed16AHealthcareOrganization.toFhir()
    Gets the CH EMED EPR FHIR representation of this object.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Identifier
    ChMed16APatientId.toFhir()

    Resolves the main human author of the document.
    List<ChEmedEprMedicationRequestPre>
    ChEmedEprCompositionPre.resolveMedicationRequests()
    Returns the list medication requests or throws.
    List<@NonNull ChEmedEprMedicationRequestPre>
    ChEmedEprDocumentPre.resolveMedicationRequests()
    Convenience method to resolve all the medication requests listed in the composition of this prescription document.

    Description

    Adds a single dose information to the dosage instructions list.
    protected List<@NonNull org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Dosage>
    EPrescriptionConverter.getDosage(EPrescriptionMedicament medicament)
    Gets the CH EMED EPR dosage instructions, i.e. the list of Dosage objects, for a medication entry of an eMediplan ePrescription.
